rationale.R1.6: The agent provided a careful copy-edit pass, improving the section's clarity and removing redundancies effectively.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not consistently mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked proper annotation.
